textByHash.ed9a0e0283731762f5cee6fe2e4226309cee74ca: Where the king of the serpents,
textByHash.a0a0fb4e842571e4f25fac95952c4d4a1c0ac11a: The storm it was a ragin',
textByHash.63966972da2cf8935989a7f0414bf0e4a7771cb9: The bell rang with a tolling,
textByHash.bbbc675ac00be7799f2feb06c5fa0810ffb895e8: From the fate of his quest,
textByHash.7976303b9bae45226394cd4bcf941598cb1ace86: Winds tore through the main sail,
textByHash.ce45f954174656d28baf9d5aafc1a82944fdc4f3: Hello? Yes? You want something, outerlander?
textByHash.21141c2ed69a5cc14fc27ea05ada705379b5a19e: Why, indeed I am, outerlander! My talents as an exemplary musician made it difficult for them not to accept me! Why do you wish to know this?
textByHash.0c62d81b43337037b9569d42beaf9523e5f2b793: Ahhh... and you wish to earn my vote? I will gladly accept you as a Fremennik should you be able to prove yourself to have a little musical ability!
textByHash.75617ed1ed5cf555a7b8159d7fba19b4d962a77b: Why, by playing in our longhall! All you need to do is impress the revellers there with a few verses of an epic of your own creation!
textByHash.6394574c0b0d356cbe79144c52d536a94fe47695: So what say you outerlander? Are you up for the challenge?
textByHash.f63bb2ab45044b528bafe284bb1bafc6ae561ffe: That is great news outerlander! We always need more music lovers here!
textByHash.e774a3fcab090611534a6973c3ac362594fa86a5: Well, first of all you are going to need an instrument. Like all true bards you are going to have to make this yourself.
textByHash.eabd543e13cf273ddc3f39a5a49aee5695050f8e: Well, it is a long and drawn-out process. Just east of this village there is an unusually musical tree that can be used to make very high quality instruments.
textByHash.14f9a23cbe1d3feeb7e97bee3c5f7137098b667d: Cut a piece from it, and then carve it into a special shape that will allow you to string it. Using a knife as you would craft any other wooden object would be best for this.
textByHash.3c582f2b4eabe140c444a3b7d7d688d75e33c321: Next you will need to string your lyre. There is a troll to the South-east who has some golden wool. I would not recommend using anything else to string your lyre with.
textByHash.01c893431e5f7485d5467cb936909123035058a1: Well, when you have crafted your lyre you will need the blessing of the Fossegrimen to tune your lyre to perfection before you even consider a public performance.
textByHash.fbecb6fa1a7ef6cd040f84971b92290f67c125f7: Fossegrimen is a lake spirit that lives just a little way South-west of this village. Make her an offering of fish, and you will then be ready for your performance.
textByHash.d64badf761b3d42af1fbf40f39454d02289ba146: Make sure you give her a suitable offering however. If the offering is found to be unworthy, then you may find yourself unable to play your lyre with any skill at all!
textByHash.2af7b1acf28c96e2667be6b5db4dc639db7dd130: A raw shark, manta ray, or sea turtle should be sufficient as an offering.
textByHash.e18adcb68cadfd19d3b81b72ee66050092c09273: When you have crafted your lyre and been blessed by Fossegrimen, then you will finally be ready to make your performance to the revellers at the longhall.
textByHash.871d2ce995b656952bac293e073900c06ddc4d3c: Head past the bouncers and onto the stage, and then begin to play. If all goes well, you should find the music spring to your mind and sing your own epic on the spot.
textByHash.c8614f82174af8251ed7581049ab6d5e196d89dc: I will observe both you and the audience, and if you show enough talent, I will happily vote in your favour at the council of elders.
textByHash.7ab952f690750adda4ff914615abaae05b6572fe: Is that clear enough, outerlander? Would you like me to repeat anything?
textByHash.e89b0f42587b697b75337b53a3b0759af7450468: There are three parts to making the lyre; First you need to cut some special wood from the special musical tree which can be found just east of Rellekka.
textByHash.a881dd5c4a1ac6093d81659e1dc6adcdd44ef597: When you have the wood, you will need to use a knife to craft it into a Lyre. When you have an unstrung lyre, you will need to string it before you can play it.
textByHash.f1280c91a9aef276f5ed5688d18668acd6a8702e: I would not use anything other than the golden string of Lalli, a troll who lives in a cave just to the South-east.
textByHash.b6f37465245f87fa2a3b18f17a35fd9763ffe917: Certainly outerlander! Fossegrimen is a lake spirit who lives in the lake just to the South-west of here. She will bless you so that you may play your lyre,
textByHash.1eaa74e18a6f0137ee039aca1eed7f670e1b9949: if you give her a worthy offering. She will only accept raw fish, so place a raw fish on her pedestal, and she will bless you. The better the offering, the longer
textByHash.3eee5e007c05431249ef330f858d2eeee84739ca: the amount of time you will be blessed for. You will not be able to perform on stage without the blessing of the Fossegrimen.
textByHash.c09d567ea7696e7da6150c5d47cc1b7058427b2b: Not a problem outerlander. When you have your lyre and have been blessed, you will be able to pass the bouncer at the stage entrance of the longhall.
textByHash.cd858b751fd3bdccd177f694a3ae1cbfb7308016: He will not let you pass unless he believes you are ready to perform on stage. Simply go past him and onto the stage and use your lyre, and you will
textByHash.0c3a074a5bb993d071e79520e26e916eefbb83a6: begin to play to entertain the revellers. If all has gone well, you will feel the music come to your mind, unbidden, as you sing an epic of your exploits.
textByHash.992e6923c684f87f1b20aac81975b581560ed094: I will watch your performance from backstage, and also study how much the crowd likes you, and if I believe you have enough talent, then I will vote for you at the council.
textByHash.63b27b7bda5adc625b1c41a9f8eee6ae0d8f2f7d: Wow! That was awesome! You are one of the greatest bards I have ever had the pleasure of watching performing! You have certainly earned my vote! I hope we can duet together soon!
textByHash.a19a1555bcd73ffac3282c7811c67e490dac7b31: You have a truly poetic soul! Anyone who can compose such a beautiful epic, and then perform it so flawlessly can only bring good to our clan!
textByHash.560a9ba24f79e2e1be819e3e224bdca32a1ab67e: Absolutely! We must collaborate together on a duet sometime, don't you think?
textByHash.dfdfada8bbeb20d41e05b5fcb59d3698b8b80cb3: Well, as official Fremennik bard, it falls within my remit to compose all music for the tribe. I am fully versed in all the various types of romantic music.
textByHash.968812f8262985fd9f7550066822bf71730f50f9: Well... normally I would be thrilled at the chance to show my skill as a poet in composing a seductively romantic ballad...
textByHash.c2ee9c2430a99b4cf7a4c45a953e53ae3a056fc1: ...but unfortunately I cannot concentrate fully upon my work recently.
textByHash.ec5d8b9503412b8d8364c8cd73792d4e67590983: It is these old worn out shoes of mine... As a bard I am expected to wander the lands, singing of the glorious battles of our warriors.
textByHash.934f12709ce7101492699da141bd82468e5b8b0e: If you can find me a pair of sturdy boots to replace these old worn out ones of mine, I will be happy to spend the time on composing you a romantic ballad.
textByHash.836d10ba931f33085f113d563aa5d83c6c71ba75: That depends outerlander... Do you have some new boots for me? My feet get so tired roaming the land...
textByHash.b54d6dd1af6532b01c905b5cf00fd2ff47d5aa7a: Oh! Superb! Those are great! They're just what I was looking for! Here, take this song with my compliments! It is one of my finest works yet!
textByHash.a2511f57ac2bde66ea2f39790b175c306d85f930: Ahhh.... outerlander... it is the most beautiful romantic ballad I have ever been inspired to write...
textByHash.1cfd2b7db890205a280b10d9858f2f83339430ec: Only a woman with a heart of icy stone could fail to be moved by its beauty!
textByHash.f44e1402a88e471141a304c579eeb1262dfd7edf: I am afraid I cannot speak to outerlanders. Besides, I am busy composing an epic.
textByHash.00c8ca5d35b21e3baf458b21ed2f8e45bab24824: Hello again to you . Us bards should stick together, what?
textByHash.3d15c618705c82b70bd276a495e368afceda5371: That's right! If you know that then you'll also know that they cost 99000 coins.
textByHash.feb1b32de4c421fc949a6038c64e2a0dcdbdd4a3: Most certainly, and free of charge!
textByHash.cc6f13429c61842305125bb3936688e63ee888c0: Yes, but you don't know all of the music in the land.
textByHash.5aaeeae26f0653dbe34cec6f4ddb80d53bc2e379: Oh my! This must be the jaw of a legendary Basilisk Knight. There's a great song about how the Fremennik warriors of old would use these jaws to enhance their helmets.
textByHash.7c6cc1e97c1d23bd09876a80323b170004f5ccfe: I'm sure it would. Now, do you want to hear the song?
textByHash.ac33d01f5491ab0204c3137cf08e0a80aee61bc7: Well, that is an interesting question. Let me let you into a little secret. If you make another offering to Fossegrimen you will learn a secret melody.
textByHash.0d091f83c226a9d10f50f6c8a310585534b41fc9: It is the song of Rellekka. When you play it, it will bring you back to this town wherever you are in this world.
textByHash.a52c4fd4773fe218dc7cc59e21fa8feea0410cb9: We often go adventuring with bards for precisely this reason; No matter where we have ended up we can return safe and sound to home.
